scripts.check:merge-markers: sh -c 'TMP_FILE=$(mktemp); if command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1; then rg -n "^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)" app tests > "$TMP_FILE" || true; else grep -R -n -E "^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)" app tests > "$TMP_FILE" || true; fi; if [ -s "$TMP_FILE" ]; then cat "$TMP_FILE"; echo "Unresolved merge conflict markers found."; rm -f "$TMP_FILE"; exit 1; else echo "No merge conflict markers found."; rm -f "$TMP_FILE"; fi'
